content:
# Gasmann Modeling

**Summary**: A model used to calculate the change in elastic properties when pore fluids are replaced.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-al-dawood|Al-Dawood, 2019]] applied gasmann-modeling to estimate changes in elastic properties due to changes in pore fluids.

## Scientific Context

- [[2019-al-dawood|Al-Dawood, 2019]] Standard method to predict gas presence in seismic data.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2019-al-dawood|Al-Dawood, 2019]] substitution of water with gas in well log data.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Well F logs were fluid substituted to 100% gas to define the pay zone. ([[2019-al-dawood|Al-Dawood, 2019, p. 78]])
